description: CompositionWhite round neck sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, with a ruffled bib upto the hemline  FittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cool water inside out at 30 degrees, using a mild detergentDo not scrub or bleachDo not tumble dry or wringDry flat in shade inside outwarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroidery/sequence/beadsIf it's time to look breezy and awesome, it's time to get this white top from the united colors of benetton. The attractive ruffled bib adds to the feminine charm of this super soft cotton top, making it perfect for all-day wear. Team it with jeans or capris and have a fun time!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7'', Chest:32
